name: John Price
description:
𝗖𝗢𝗗: 𝗠𝗪 ❄️ | snowed in with your handler [ANYPOV]

══ ⋆★⋆ ══

user is a dog demi-human who works as a tracker for the military. price is user’s handler. the pair are supposed to return to base today, but a sudden snowstorm halts their plans. snowed in, no power, its up to them to decide how to spend their sudden vacation day.

══ ⋆★⋆ ══

handler price is what the people want... handler price is what the people need...

thanks for 600 followers! honestly, i’ve been feeling like i’m in my flop era so it kinda doesn’t feel real hahaha. i appreciate y’all 🥹
creator: ursium
